reproducibility: real repo + pinned vuln/patched SHAs; line-precise; pin-or-drop.

seed.sink: The searchUserInfo username parameter replaces {0} in userFilter; the resulting filter is passed through getSingleResult to DirContext.search without RFC 4515 filter escaping.
seed.patched_shape: Wrap username in escapeLdapFilter before substituting it into userFilter.

heldout.sink: An authentication username is interpolated directly into the ldap3 search filter passed to Connection.search.
heldout.patched_shape: Build the filter in make_search_filter after ldap3.utils.conv.escape_filter_chars(username).

heldout.sink: The LDAP-auth username is interpolated into filter_str and later supplied as the filter argument to python-ldap search_s. A second nested-groups filter similarly interpolates user_dn.
heldout.patched_shape: Escape username and user_dn with ldap.filter.escape_filter_chars before constructing either search filter.

heldout.sink: The authentication username replaces [search] in the configured LDAP filter and the result is passed directly to simple_search.
heldout.patched_shape: Escape credentials username with LDAP_ESCAPE_FILTER before str_replace; use LDAP_ESCAPE_DN separately for bind DNs.
